label: Itau
notes: Always open Itaú benefit cards via Ver más/detail view and confirm tier/day splits before changing percentages.

inScope.title: 15%  menos en iPlace
inScope.note: Premium/Personal Bank only. The double space in the title is on the live source.

inScope.title: 15% menos en Starbucks en bebidas
inScope.note: Day logic on bar-prepared drinks; preserve scope in notes

inScope.note: Premium vs general split with day logic

inScope.title: 25% y 15% menos en San Roque
inScope.note: Same shape as Farmacia El Túnel (premium/general + day)

inScope.title: 2x1 en Movie

label: Santander
notes: Open the browser detail for each Santander merchant because tier and day logic often differs from the teaser card.

label: BBVA

fetchHeaders.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/134.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

mustNotContainAny: Para utilizar las funcionalidades completas de este sitio es necesario tener Cookies y JavaScript habilitado.

notes: Use the deterministic direct-fetch helper as the primary path from the Uruguay host, and treat validation markers as mandatory proof the real descuentos page loaded.

label: Scotiabank
notes: Benefit pages may split cards and merchants across multiple sections, so use browser navigation and open the full detail state.

label: BROU
notes: Use the deterministic BROU snapshot helper as the primary repo-local path. Preserve reimbursement caps when the source includes them, and audit against the expanded browser detail when the helper needs repair.

label: OCA
notes: OCA and OCA Blue can diverge, so keep source distinctions visible and prefer full browser detail over teaser copy.

label: Prex
notes: Traverse every current `Ver más` detail page under PROMOCIONES ESPECIALES and AHORRÁ TODOS LOS DÍAS from `/beneficios`. Inspect `/beneficiosarg` only to confirm it is AR-only and skip it for Uruguay runtime data. Ignore PROMOCIONES FINALIZADAS and any detail pages that do not map cleanly to the discount schema.

label: Antel
notes: Traverse every first-level benefits page from `/beneficios`, then traverse every category under `/beneficios/descuentos`. Merchant offers are often embedded blocks inside category pages rather than separate URLs. Ignore raffles, telecom product perks without a discount percent, institutional convenios, and other non-schema noise.

label: Club El País
notes: Use the homepage as the starting point, then traverse every live rubro page (`entretenimiento`, `gastronomia`, `vestimenta`, `ninos`, `bienestar`, `educacion`, `hogar`, `turismo`). Treat the `venta_online=1` query as an audit pass, not a separate source. Skip unavailable event cards (`AGOTADO`, `Suspendido`, `Función suspendida`) and cards that expose only campaign chrome without a stable current benefit figure.
